{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Tartarus guards
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Grandmaster Naraka]] has three [[Tartarus guards]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Tartarus guards]] bound [[Grandmaster Naraka]] with chains.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
